title: WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides residential substance use disorder services. 10700 SW Beaverton-Hillside Highway Suite 110 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Women with substance use disorder issues who are pregnant or have children under age 6 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 645-9010 Toll-free (888) 645-1666 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Some programs accept OHP (Medicaid), Medicare, serve uninsured individuals, or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County, and Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 48 on Cornell Road Services: Perinatal Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PROMOTORA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON
